title: CTOV - Create: Structures
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Create:Structures mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Create:Structures. You will find some windmills and watermills on villages. 1.20+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Create:Structures mod**

Create:Structures can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-structures)


**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
